untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern geometry analysis (height/width combinations, U-shaped vs dome-shaped volume profiles, and pattern classification). These geometric pattern properties are not available in the allowed indicators list. The source text is incomplete and does not provide specific quantitative thresholds. Proxy conditions using volume trend and volatility were applied, but true pattern morphology cannot be captured without candlestick pattern recognition indicators.
